cooked:
Ok, I have been browsing the MBN downloads, sacred carrot, emerald moon base etc and the things you can get are truly amazing! Change the text, change the font of the text, story coder, LBArchitect, programs to view all files in hqrs and pack in your own stuff to overwrite, etc. With all this, Im decided: Im going to make a completely new version of LBA2. All buildings different. Completely new story. I think its highly possible, if I work hard enough. You people may think I do not know enough! But here, in great britain, we respect intelligence and good spirit! higher voice And so whether the MBN will support me or not I will make this project come true!

*walks off*
raw:
Ok, I have been browsing the MBN downloads, sacred carrot, emerald moon base etc.. and the things you can get are truly amazing! Change the text, change the font of the text, story coder, LBArchitect, programs to view all files in hqr's and pack in your own stuff to overwrite, etc. With all this, I'm decided: I'm going to make a completely new version of LBA2. All buildings different. Completely new story. I think its highly possible, if I work hard enough. You people may think I do not know enough! But here, in great britain, we respect intelligence and good spirit! *higher voice* And so.. whether the MBN will support me or not.. I will make this project come true!
 
\*walks off*

cooked:
Hey, nice to see your enthusiasms in this modifications and also thanks for the compliments

I think choosing LBA2 to make a new version isnt a good choice. Simply because we dont have tools enough to make something really different in LBA2 besides new room designs and some limited scene definitions.

I suggest you to make such thing for LBA1 which are better reversed and well-known. Also you have lots of tools to change it.

Other thing is that you could for example help one of the LBA modification projects, like TGR. Well I dont mean Prequel because were not accepting more people yet, and maybe TGR have any task for you in this matter.

Anyway, youre free to do what you want and think you could do, this was just an advice of someone who also help developing some of the tools
raw:
Hey, nice to see your enthusiasms in this modifications and also thanks for the compliments :)

I think choosing LBA2 to make a new version isn't a good choice. Simply because we don't have tools enough to make something really different in LBA2 besides new room designs and some limited scene definitions.

I suggest you to make such thing for LBA1 which are better reversed and well-known. Also you have lots of tools to change it.

Other thing is that you could for example help one of the LBA modification projects, like TGR. Well I don't mean Prequel because we're not accepting more people yet, and maybe TGR have any task for you in this matter.

Anyway, you're free to do what you want and think you could do, this was just an advice of someone who also help developing some of the tools ;)
